body_txt: Two characters are fighting against or with each other in a battle, and occasionally they find themselves swapping their weapons with each other. The reasons for this vary. If enemies: If allies: Not to be confused with Real-Time Weapon Change . Compare with Use Their Own Weapon Against Them , if one person's is lost and used by another, and with Opponent Switch , when instead of weapons, you change who you're targeting. Also compare Power Swap for the superpower equivalent.
